_meta.purpose: SEO-carrying sentences written in natural Hinglish. Engine picks MAX 1 from here per review. {{city}} and {{area}} replaced dynamically.
rules: Location must feel like the patient is genuinely mentioning it
Never force the keyword — if it sounds unnatural, rewrite it
Split into location and credibility pools same as English
{{city}} and {{area}} are the only placeholders here

location: {{city}} mein agar homeopathy dhundh rahe ho toh yahi aana.
{{area}} ke logon ke liye toh yeh clinic gift jaisi hai seriously.
{{city}} mein itna accha homeopathic doctor milna mushkil hai.
Humne {{city}} mein kaafi jagah try ki thi, yahan sab se zyada fark pada.
{{area}} mein rehne walon ko yeh clinic zaroor try karni chahiye.
{{city}} waalon ke liye seriously best option hai yeh.
Itna dhundhne ke baad {{city}} mein yahi jagah sahi lagi.
Jo log {{area}} se door hain wo bhi yahan aane layak hai.
{{city}} mein is clinic ki reputation bahut acchi hai aur sahi bhi hai.
Meri puri family {{city}} mein ab yahan hi aati hai.
{{city}} mein best homeopathic doctor ki baat ho toh Dr. Verma ka naam sabse pehle aata hai.
Pure India se log {{city}} mein Dr. Verma ke paas aate hain — yeh koi baat toh hai.
Dr. Verma ne {{city}} ko fast homeopathy ke liye famous kar diya hai.
{{city}} ka nahi, poore India ka best homeopathic doctor kehna galat nahi hoga.
Main {{area}} se door rehta hoon phir bhi yahan aaya — aur zaroor wapas aaunga.
credibility: Doctor ka experience bahut hai, feel hota hai baat karte waqt.
Itne saal ka experience show karta hai unke treatment mein.
Clinic ki reputation acchi hai aur deserve karti hai.
Itne patients aate hain yahan, kuch toh wajah hai.
Systematic treatment hoti hai yahan, random nahi lagta.
Saalon ka experience hai doctor sahab ko, pata chalta hai.
Bahut families yahan aati hain — word of mouth se hi itna naam ho gaya.
